summary: Iteration 16: Active Bids & Outbid Features Testing Complete. All 18 backend tests pass. Frontend UI verified for NotificationBell, MyBidsPage, CreditsOverlay (mobile centering), and Leaderboard translations.
seed_data_creation: None - test user has no active bids, so commitments/outbid sections not visible (expected behavior)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 validated the Active Bids & Outbid features. Backend endpoints /me/preauths and /stripe/authorizations/my-credits correctly return is_leading flag and outbid_bids[] respectively. Frontend components NotificationBell.jsx, MyBidsPage.jsx, CreditsOverlay.jsx all have correct data-testid attributes and render properly. Leaderboard translations verified for EN/RO/BG. Mobile CreditsOverlay centering works correctly using createPortal(document.body). Test user has no active bids so commitments/outbid sections are empty (expected).

backend_api_tests: GET /api/me/preauths (auth) → 200, returns list with is_leading, user_max_bid_eur, current_bid_eur, ends_at, max_amount_eur fields
GET /api/stripe/authorizations/my-credits (auth) → 200, returns holds[], commitments[], outbid_bids[], totals
frontend_ui_tests: Homepage loads correctly with login button and leaderboard link
Login flow works for test user (sectest_user@test.bg)
NotificationBell opens and shows 'No notifications' (user has no active bids)
NotificationBell has data-testid='notification-bell' and data-testid='active-bids-section' (renders when activeBids.length > 0)
MyBidsPage (/my-bids) loads with data-testid='my-bids-page', shows totals, empty state for holds
MyBidsPage has data-testid='my-bids-commitments' and data-testid='my-bids-outbid' sections (render when data exists)
CreditsOverlay on mobile (390x844) opens centered in viewport using createPortal(document.body)
CreditsOverlay has data-testid='credits-overlay' with fixed inset-0 z-[60] flex items-center justify-center
Leaderboard page shows EN translations: Reputation, Sales, Comments, Bids tabs
Leaderboard period toggle: All time / 30 days buttons visible
Leaderboard subtitle: 'The most active members of the Auto&Bid community.'

EN.leaderboard.subtitle: The most active members of the Auto&Bid community.

code_verification.NotificationBell.jsx: Correctly fetches /me/preauths and renders activeBids with is_leading flag, green/amber badges
code_verification.MyBidsPage.jsx: Correctly fetches /stripe/authorizations/my-credits and renders commitments[] and outbid_bids[] sections
code_verification.CreditsOverlay.jsx: Uses createPortal(document.body) with fixed inset-0 z-[60] flex items-center justify-center for proper centering
code_verification.stripe_holds.py: my_credits_summary returns outbid_bids[] alongside commitments[] and holds[]
code_verification.server.py: my_preauths returns is_leading boolean for each auction
